steps.t: Utlac is at the Rohirrim-camp in the East Wall. You have recovered many crude bows from the Orcs that inhabit the East Wall and should bring them to U…
A camp-fire near Utlac is just the place to burn the Orc-bows you have taken. Utlac cannot bear to handle the Orc-bows any longer and has asked you to…
Utlac is at the Rohirrim-encampment, waiting to speak with you.
